title: 11Pcs Mini Screwdriver Set, Precision Screwdrivers with Mini Pocket Size Carrying Case, Perfect for Glasses, Watches, Remotes and Computers
features: ✅ HEAVY DUTY MATERIAL - This mini screwdriver set is made of steel, coated with a chrome finish and processed with heat treatment to create an endurance lasting set of precision screwdrivers

✅ ADJUSTABLE & ANTI-SLIP HAND TOOLS - The handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to hold due to its ergonomic design. Magnetic tips for easy installation and removal of fasteners with excellent durability, effectively reduces hand fatigue.

✅ PORTABLE SIZE & CARRYING CASE - Tiny screwdriver set extremely portable and very practical with its size. A handy storage case is included to keep the screwdrivers organized and well stored. Head Screwdriver no.00, no.0, no.1 Flathead Screwdriver 1mm 1.2mm 1.4mm 1.8mm 2.4mm 3.0mm

✅ WIDE APPLICATIONS - The 11pc precision small screwdriver set can be used for both individual and professional purposes including repairing phones, watchmakers screwdriver set, TVs, computer kit, laptops, iphone repair kit, eyeglasses repair kit, cameras, pc tool kit set, watch tool kit , miniature screwdriver set ,small glasses screwdriver tool ,optical screwdriver set, household appliances. This precision mini screwdriver set is perfect tool for all fine mechanical repairs.
